# Automatic tests

After completing all the steps in the project, automatic tests will become available to you. Tests are run on each commit - once all tasks in the Hexlet interface are completed, make a commit, and the tests will run automatically.

The hexlet-check.yml file is responsible for running these tests - do not delete this file, edit it, or rename the repository.

# SonarCloud:

[![SonarQube Cloud](https://sonarcloud.io/images/project_badges/sonarcloud-dark.svg)](https://sonarcloud.io/summary/new_code?id=Temalllytera_python-project-83)

## Page Analyzer

Веб-приложение для анализа страниц на SEO-пригодность. Позволяет проверять доступность сайтов и извлекать SEO-данные: заголовок, h1 и мета-описание.

### Demo
https://python-project-83-hhbs.onrender.com

## Требования

- Python 3.10+
- PostgreSQL
- uv

## Установка

```bash
git clone https://github.com/Temalllytera/python-project-83.git
cd python-project-83
make install
``
